Field Description: check number or payment reference number assigned by the payer (typically the health insurance company or the paying entity) for that specific payment or claim.
Group Policy Number assigned by the payer.

Format: Left Justified, with trailing spaces - Value if fund code is populated – this allows for bulk pulls from account
Field Description: code representing the financial source or fund from which the payment is being made.

1. The records which has same check Number and the corresponding Check amount should be summed up and stored in this field
2. Last 2 digits are for decimal point in amount fields
Field Description: Total amount of the check issued to the provider. Represents the gross payment made.

Format: YYYYMMDD - Void Date or Cleared Date

Update to HRP: Only the status in HRP changes to  CLEARED and CLEARED date get updated from the field, after checking the value of 'Void_flag'
Comments:
1. Populate 'clearedCheckDate' when the Void Flag field is empty, as the the check is considered cleared.
2. Date Format should be YYYY-MM-DD
Field Description: The date the payment activity occurred, usually the date the check/EFT was issued.
Name of the provider or entity receiving the payment. Matches the name associated with the claim or EPPID.

Field Description: Draft/Check/EFT reference number generated by the payment vendor. Used for payment tracking.

Field Description: Amount of the payment corresponding to that specific draft/check/EFT.

Comments:
1. when Void Flag is 'Y', Populate "VOID"
